Title: Fluctuations - Part 2
Actors: Adam McArthur, Shigeru Chiba, Robbie Daymond
Plot: Nanami, Maki, and Naobito are driven to the edge after the Special-Grade Cursed Spirit, Dagon, activates his Domain Expansion. Fushiguro gives them a glimpse of a way to escape death, then Toji intrudes upon the fight.
